user.title: GoCardless API Setup
user.description:
Enter your GoCardless/Nordigen API credentials.

Get your free API keys at [{gocardless_url}]({gocardless_url}).

**Security:** Your credentials are encrypted and stored locally in Home Assistant. They are never sent to any third party except GoCardless.

link_bank.title: Link Bank Account
link_bank.description: Select your banking institution to authorize access via Open Banking.

error.missing_credentials: Please enter both Secret ID and Secret Key.
error.invalid_credentials: Could not connect to GoCardless. Please verify your API credentials.
error.connection_failed: Connection to GoCardless failed. Please check your internet connection.

init.title: Restart Required
init.description: Finance Dashboard has been updated to version {version}. A restart is required to apply the update.
